endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourcegroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.OperationalInsights/workspaces/{workspaceName}/dataExports
endpoints.description: Lists the data export instances within a workspace.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{WORKSPACENAME}} with a real workspacename.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourcegroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.OperationalInsights/workspaces/{workspaceName}/dataExports/{dataExportName}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{DATAEXPORTNAME}} with a real dataexportname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{WORKSPACENAME}} with a real workspacename.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourcegroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.OperationalInsights/workspaces/{workspaceName}/dataExports/{dataExportName}
endpoints.description: Create or update a data export.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{DATAEXPORTNAME}} with a real dataexportname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{WORKSPACENAME}} with a real workspacename.

endpoints.name: DELETE /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourcegroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.OperationalInsights/workspaces/{workspaceName}/dataExports/{dataExportName}
endpoints.description: Deletes the specified data export in a given workspace..
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{DATAEXPORTNAME}} with a real dataexportname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{WORKSPACENAME}} with a real workspacename.
